description: Case Style: Analog watch with a stainless steel back and rectangular case that is mounted on to the strap, has crystal embellishments on the case in front around the dial Dial Style: Bronze dial with a shimmery detail in the centre, branding on the dial, steel coloured hour marks and hands with crystal embellishment on quarter hour marks Features: Screw to reset time Strap Style: White coloured strap with a tang clasp and holes to customise fit Water resistant up to 3 BAR Warranty: 1 year
